reviews.review_description:
​I purchased this app specifically to create a simple "White Void" 360-degree environment to use in Moon VR, as I hate watching movies against a pitch-black background. However, it is currently impossible to create your own custom 360 images in Moon Portal. You are forced to choose from images made by others, and the experience of scrolling through them is painfully slow and clunky.
​I even tried downgrading to the older version to use the AI generation feature, but the AI is useless. No matter how many times I prompted for a "pure empty white void," it kept giving me sky backgrounds filled with clouds. This app is practically worthless for custom needs. Don't waste your money.

​Also, a message to the Moon VR developers: You should have added a simple feature to change the background color to white or gray in the first place. If you had any consideration for the terrible ghosting and glare issues on Quest 3, you’d know how necessary this is. It’s not even a difficult feature to implement. Oh, and one more thing—when on earth are you going to add screen rotation for the Theater mode?

reviews.review_title: I absolutely hate EVERYTHING about this
reviews.review_description:
I purchased Moon VR Player AND the Moon VR Portal apps because I wanted to be able to watch movies in my own custom 360 photo of my old house. In the previous versions of Moon Portal and Moon VR, this was absolutely possible. Since some recent update, a function that was ALREADY a part of the application was removed. I tried to go to their “Legacy Version” to restore this functionality, but when I entered my login information, I was met with the message that it was not possible to join the group because that version is either too old or no longer available. This is kind of my last straw with everything associated with Meta/Oculus. I spent money on a product that offered a feature that I enjoyed, and they chose to remove that very feature. Not just this app, but EVERYTHING related to Meta makes me sick and hate this stupid timeline we are in where features are removed after you pay for something. I absolutely hate EVERYTHING about this, I will never spend another dime on this stupid company that gives and then takes away from loyal customers. I hope your company fairs as poorly as you treat your customers. Never again.

Update on April 25, 2026: So you mention AGAIN that the feature was removed, but the GOOD NEWS is that I can watch movies in a 360 environment made with AI slop? No! I bought a 360 camera LITERALLY for the purpose of watching stuff in my own custom JPEG background, and you charged EXTRA for me to have that feature, which I was OK with. But now you took that feature away! How much trouble would it be to just allow me to import images that are ALREADY on the headset? It's literally a JPEG! God, what a waste of time and money!

developer_response.body:
Just to clarify for anyone reading — there might be a bit of confusion between Player Environment and the old Quest Custom Home environments.
The Custom Home feature is no longer supported by Quest, so unfortunately we can’t bring it back.

So the good news is you can still watch movies in the 360 environments you got from Portal. Just tested it myself, works great! Here's how:

https://moonvrplayer.com/blog/192/quest-pico-exclusive-share-moon-portal-s-virtual-environments-with-moon-player

reviews.review_description: Do not buy this, it doesn't do what you think it does. You also cant get a refund because it's not eligible.

I took the opportunity of the discount to purchase this software as well as MoonVR, and even stayed up late into the early morning to study how to use them. However, the result was extremely disappointing – the feature for switching between scenes is no longer available. Was there no explanation provided at all? As a result, I had to search through a lot of information to find out about this issue, and the FAQ on the official website doesn’t contain any updated information either.The customer service of the official account can't be found anywhere, so take a step back in terms of use. Since it is agreed that the Chinese version of the results will stay in the test suit and will not be updated, only 360 scenes will be downloaded, and 3d scenes can't be downloaded and can only be previewed. In moonvr, I just stare at a few pictures and switch back and forth, and I can't turn around yet. The experience is really bad.It seems that time has passed for a long time, and with the problems I mentioned above, I really doubt that you have begun to mess up. The score can be changed, You know that.

As of November 11th, 2025: the customize feature is not available on Quest 3 on the latest upgrade. Since half the reason why I bought this app was the ability to create customized environments, they get a half rating. 

If the customize feature is ever activated, I might edit my review. My time has value, and vr vaporware in 2025 is not acceptable. 

Also, note that you cannot go up or down. Any environments with different levels will be treated as if you are on an infinite plane.

If you fear heights, be aware that some places have you suspended in the air!

developer_response.body:
Sorry about that. Due to updates in the Quest system and developer SDK, some older features are no longer supported on the latest OS, and we were forced to discontinue a few legacy functions — including customized environments.

To help users who still want those features, we’ve kept a legacy version available. On the app’s main screen, you’ll see three buttons in the upper left corner — tap the middle one, then select Legacy Version to roll back.

reviews.review_description: Hello. I'm talking about Moon portal, the idea is very cool... But we need even more content to be able to navigate through the portal, because we use the portal both indoors and outdoors. I also want to see the Quality (Graphics.) Thank you.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your suggestions. Every scene in Moon Portal is fully 3D and requires a lot of time for modeling and optimization. It takes a long time to build them. Thank you for understanding.

reviews.review_description: Not much to do and what they have is poor quality "if it works" I would like my money back if possible.

developer_response.body:
Sorry to hear this. We’re actively improving content quality and stability.
If you need assistance, please contact info@moonvrhome.com.
Refunds are handled through the Meta Store.

reviews.review_description: I can't save any on quest 3.   Nothing appears in the moon player either

developer_response.body:
plz follow this instructions:

reviews.review_description: for me i loved the fact i could export enviroments that i liked, which was what i wanted to enjoy my movies

developer_response.body: Thank you❤️ LOVE FROM MOON

reviews.review_description:
Back months / maybe a year later - 

No improvements whatsoever..

World still has a transparent look where you can partly see your room through the 360 image which just ruins it.

90% of the world's are super low quality (even though it says loading high quality or something while loading)

Having a snap turn for the portal makes it a car crash to line up in your room. Why have a smooth move on the left and then a snap on the right instead of a smooth turn to easily line up the portal.

Upon walking back out of a portal and into the real world you walk through part of the 360 image (hard to explain unless you try it) but it's more jank and ruins the idea even more.

I've paid for this twice now so I can't refund it again without going through Meta and explaining how poor the app is but I will make sure I sort that out.

My advice - don't buy this.

developer_response.body:
We’re truly sorry that the experience didn’t meet your expectations, and we regret the frustration it has caused.

The issues you mentioned — such as the semi-transparent visuals, low image quality, snap turn behavior, and the glitch when exiting the portal — are all known bugs related to current technical limitations. Our team has been actively working to resolve them, and we’re continuously pushing updates to improve the overall experience.

As for the inability to refund your second purchase, this is a policy set by Meta. Unfortunately, as developers, we don’t have control over their refund system, though we understand your frustration.

We genuinely appreciate your feedback. It helps us make the app better, and we hope you’ll consider revisiting it in the future as we continue to improve.

reviews.review_description: It's a really bad app, poor quality images and a half baked app. Can't even get a refund, even though I purchased it less than 2 hours ago, and less than the 14 day limit.

developer_response.body:
What issues are you experiencing?
Please let us know so we can help resolve them. You can contact us via email at info@moonvrhome.com

Also, please note that all refund policies are set by Meta. As developers, we have no authority to modify or override Meta’s refund rules.

reviews.review_description:
I enjoy the time travel feature in Moon Portal. It should be the core feature, as it help me to see how certain places have changed over time, like Times Square, it’s amazing to watch the transformation. However, some images don't quite line up perfectly, and I hope the devs can refine that in future updates. Despite that, it’s still an incredible feature.

I personally love seeing what has stayed the same through the years. The contrast between the old and new really brings history to life in a way I didn’t expect.

reviews.review_title: I like immersive scenes like this
reviews.review_description: I bought this mainly to use with Moon Player. The environment feels calm and well designed. It's a relaxing way to watch videos in VR and it's creative in a way I haven't seen in other apps.
Standalone purchase with plenty of updates. I paid once and Moon Portal keeps evolving with new features regularly.
Walking through portals transported me into breathtaking scenes

reviews.review_title: Time Travel is exactly what I want
reviews.review_description: More spots please. I enjoy the time travel concept and would love to see more about it.
I purchased this game and it was working fine. Now it's outside the refund timeframe and I can't get anyone to help me figure out why it's not working right anymore.

developer_response.body:
We’re sorry, but the version you’re currently using — 1.7.2 (as shown in your comment history) — is a very outdated version. You should open the Horizon Store and update the app immediately.

Also, you emailed us at 10:31 AM on June 30th, and we replied at 10:39 AM — just 8 minutes later. So we’re genuinely confused as to why you would say “I can’t find anyone for help.”

We fully acknowledge that our app still has room for improvement, but this comment has left us quite puzzled and confused.

reviews.review_description:
I bought this app specifically for the Skylight Portal, but it simply doesn’t show up. After restarting the app several times, it occasionally appears, but the content is distorted and doesn’t align with the actual ceiling. That defeats the whole purpose of having a skylight experience. Very disappointing.

Also, the transparent floor window shown in the promotional video is nowhere to be found in the app.

developer_response.body: We’re sorry for the confusion. The floor window is a feature exclusive to the Vision Pro version of the app and is not available on the Quest version. We have never claimed in any of our promotional videos that this feature is included in the Quest version. You may have seen a demonstration of the Vision Pro version in a video from a third-party creator.

reviews.review_description: This app has a lot of potential! The portal feature combined with custom scenes is super creative and really fun. Would love to see more new 3D environments added!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your support! We will continue to add new features and experiences.

reviews.review_title: new thrill is a lot of fun
reviews.review_description: The new roller coaster thrill is a lot of fun , promising game

developer_response.body: Thank you for your support! We will continue to add new features and experiences.

reviews.review_description: it's good and fun.  the portal and roller coaster thirlls are fun to play

developer_response.body: Thank you for your support! We will continue to add new features and experiences.

reviews.review_description: This is where mixed reality excels and it's absolutely brilliant! The portal section is truly something special. You have a portal door within your space, including the tardis for example, and when the door opens you're presented with your chosen scene INSIDE the door which you can then walk into (OMG) and it's truly a wonderful experience. This is just one section of the app. There is also a skybox creater where you can also view other people's creations as well as a walk the plank type experience set high amongst the sky scraper. Highly recommended!!!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your heartfelt and thorough review! It truly makes my day to hear you enjoyed the Mixed Reality Portal, skybox creater and plank skywalk as much as I do! Your recommendation inspires me to keep innovating and delivering more fun. Thanks again for sharing your kind words! 😊

reviews.review_description: This app is so buggy and so f****** frustrating to navigate to the point where within MINUTES you will start to get physically agitated to the point where you're nose burns. Not user friendly,  you lose prompts for nothing and I'm gonna tell you before you buy this, they CLAIM there's lots of environments but it's just 360 photos. The ONLY reason to get it is to edit the environments from sidequest because most of them ore here. oh wait, TOO BAD EDITING A GOME ENVIRONMENT DOESNT WORK AND IS NOT USER FRIENDLY! Well at least you can float 3 thousand f****** feet above EVERY SINGLE ENVIRONMENT on the photos section. This crap should be free. If it isn't on sale for under 1.00 don't buy. I am so angry I spent money on and got lied to about what this was SUPPOSED to be.

developer_response.body:
Please check out the latest Overhaul version of our App and feel free to share your thoughts!

----------
Thanks for your feedback. As we state in the App, we’re now working hard on a major overhaul of the user experience. Hope you’ll give us another shot after the upcoming updates. Stay tuned!

If you need any help, feel free to reach out here: https://discord.gg/HwZr7kgRyF. I'll figure out what we can do for you on editing homes, which I personally love, ASAP.

Of course, if you’re still not satisfied, we completely respect your decision to request a refund. Thank you again for giving us a try!

reviews.review_description: Doesn’t work at all apart from random 3d stills - will request refund but will buy once bugs sorted

developer_response.body:
Please check out the latest Overhaul version of our App and feel free to share your thoughts!
-----------
Sorry for the bad experience, but I can't understand or reproduce the issue(Doesn’t work on 3) on my end. Could you provide more details?
	1.	Please activate both controllers and click on the input field using the raycast to enter an email to sign up or log in.
	2.	Make sure you're using the admin account on the device instead of a secondary/multiple account.
	3.	What's your system version?
	4.	You're also welcome to try out the beta version in the Beta Channel. (App Settings > Installed version information > Release Channels > Beta).

Of course, I completely understand if you prefer to request a refund. However, if you find the improvements helpful, I’d be truly grateful if you could reconsider your rating, since it means a lot to a small developer like me.

Thank you so much for your time, and feel free to join our Discord server for further help: 
https://discord.gg/HwZr7kgRyF

reviews.review_description: This one is broken for me and my Quest 3. Unusable. I have to power off the headset because it just freezes and blocks catastrophically, so to speak, the system. Waiting for an update that fixes the thing and we will see then.

developer_response.body:
Please check out the latest Overhaul version of our App and feel free to share your thoughts!

----------
Hi Mcflannagan, could you confirm if the freeze happens after applying a Custom Home? If so, do you see a system popup saying “The ShellEnv keeps stopping”? This usually indicates a system memory limitation, meaning the device can’t run the Custom Home properly. In this case, you can uninstall it from APP Library > Unknown Sources. It’d be much appreciated if you could let us know which Custom Homes aren’t working on your device due to memory limits. 

If the freeze happens within our app, please provide more details, such as your system version, the screen you were on, and what action triggered the issue. We’d love to help! Feel free to reach out here: https://discord.gg/HwZr7kgRyF

reviews.review_description:
Just installed this version bu did not work at all … can not scroll down eithes select the ambients. Would like to have my money back!
Rgds.

developer_response.body:
Please check out the latest Overhaul version of our App and feel free to share your thoughts!

----------
Hi, thanks for reaching out.

If you prefer, you can request a refund here:
https://www.meta.com/help/quest/articles/orders-and-purchases/returns/refunds-for-games-apps/

BTW could you clarify what exactly isn’t working?

For scrolling down, as mentioned in the app, this issue is due to Quest system SDK updates. We recommend using both controllers and scrolling with the thumbstick instead of pressing the trigger and dragging.

As for 'select the ambients', if you mean selecting an environment from the list, please hold the controller steady and short-press the trigger without dragging or moving, as that might cause unintended scrolling.

If you're referring to selecting background music in 'Customize', we acknowledge that this feature has issues after the system update due to low usage. We’re working on a major app update that will resolve these problems—thank you for your patience!

If you need any help, feel free to reach out here: https://discord.gg/HwZr7kgRyF

reviews.review_description:
I try to get on this game, and it is not working. It

developer_response.body:
Please check out the latest Overhaul version of our App and feel free to share your thoughts!

----------
Hi, thanks for reaching out.

You can refund Apps here:
https://www.meta.com/help/quest/articles/orders-and-purchases/returns/refunds-for-games-apps/

By the way could you please provide more details about how the App doesn't work?
Details for example:  
**Specific scenario**: Device, system version, steps leading to the error, error messages, etc. 
**Expectations**: Features or improvements you’d like to see in the app.  

Your patience and support mean the world to us, and feedback like yours drives our growth!

reviews.review_description:
First experience was being dumped to the generative skybox preview interface, and half of the skyboxes were 18+ generated images of “sexy”“women” with one arm, three legs, or torsos merging together and one eye perfectly rendered and the other a giant blob. It’s not sexy, it’s disturbing. There is a report button, but nobody seems to be using it or acting on it.  

No filtering system for backgrounds, so kids could have easily been exposed to this imagery which would have required intervention ranging from therapy, to the “talk,” to an explanation beyond the birds and bees, pulling out an anatomy book and explaining that no, there is no “third foot” that grows out of women’s thighs. 

Disappointing app all around. The AR portal is useless. You have a portal that takes up half your room that you can’t interact with or enter and a UI that ruins the immersion. Instead of cycling through interesting worlds, you have to pick one from a pop-up interface and wait as it loads. You view it for 5 seconds, get bored, and pick another one. And again, there’s no interactivity so there’s nothing to do in the app, just sit there. 

The home gallery might be interesting but it’s filled with low quality offerings and the home becomes boring quickly anyway. 

Didn’t try the plank experience, but didn’t want to as I’d have to expose my family to the rest of this terrible app.  

My advice? Remove the AI generation and curate the content. Add interactivity everywhere.  And get rid of the “adult” content or have much better consent monitoring and filtering.

developer_response.body:
Please check out the latest Overhaul version of our App and feel free to share your thoughts!

----------
Thanks so much for taking the time to share your detailed feedback! It’s clear you’ve really thought about your experience, and while we’re sorry the app didn’t meet your expectations, we genuinely appreciate your insights—they help us make things better.

As a small team, every review has a big impact on how others see our app. We’re grateful that many users are enjoying it, but we also know not everyone’s experience will be the same. Your feedback points out a few areas we’re already working on, including:
	•	Content Moderation: We realize our content moderation tools may have missed some things. We’ll make sure to review and address it as quickly as we can. While we can’t fully control AI-generated results, we’re and will be more actively improving our filtering and curation to avoid inappropriate content. Perfecting this takes some serious human effort, especially for a small team, but we’re on it!
	•	Content Quality: We’re focused on curating higher-quality experiences to make the app even more fun and engaging.
	•	Interactivity and Immersion: We’re all about making the app more interactive and dynamic, so users stay excited and immersed.

We’re constantly improving, including a full UX and GUI overhaul that’s already in the works. We’re so grateful for the support and patience from our community—it really helps us grow!

That said, if you feel the app still isn’t the right fit for you, we totally understand. You can explore the refund option through the store platform if needed, but we’d hate to see you go.

Thanks again for the thoughtful feedback—it really means a lot to us, and we’re listening! Hope you’ll give us another shot after the next update. Stay tuned!

reviews.review_description: I am really enjoying your new app.  The new thrills section is a lot of fun, and I look forward to seeing how you continue to add on to it.  It is frightening for me because I am afraid of heights and I love that. I also love the mixed reality portals and the skyboxes.  I am still learning how to use it, but it is a lot of fun.  Please continue improving your app.

developer_response.body: Thank you Jaye so much for your kind words! Just returned from vacation, and seeing your feedback was such a wonderful surprise. We're 'thrilled' to hear you're enjoying the new 'thrills' section, especially with the added excitement of heights! The mixed reality portals and skyboxes are some of our favorite features too. We're committed to making the app even better, and Your support means a lot! Enjoy exploring!

reviews.review_description: If I paid , heheh asked me again for login in ? I firget the password and them why I have to go for the wed side  instead to do in my email? I don’t know witch one is the wed side .

developer_response.body:
Please check out the latest Overhaul version of our App and feel free to share your thoughts!

----------
Thanks for your feedback. The "Website" refers to https://moonvrhome.com/, which is noted in Account Settings. You can reset your password there—it’s actually quicker and easier than doing it in VR.

We’re a small team, and while we know there’s room for improvement, we’re now working hard on a major overhaul of the user experience. Hope you’ll give us another shot after the upcoming updates. Stay tuned! If you need any help, feel free to reach out here: https://discord.gg/HwZr7kgRyF 
Thank you again for your understanding and patience!

reviews.review_description:
I was misled by some Chinese bloggers who claimed that the five generation attempts would refresh every day. In reality, only five generation attempts is free and who using AI photo generator will known this equal to nothing.

Moreover, the quality of the visuals is extremely disappointing—it feels like you’re looking at a flat 360-degree photo. Even with 8K resolution, the image quality is terrible.

While the “Portal” feature might sound like a great selling point, the user interface is clunky and full of bugs. Overall, it’s definitely not worth the price.

developer_response.body:
Please check out the latest Overhaul version of our App and feel free to share your thoughts!

----------
Hi M3L.Son, I'm sorry to hear that you were misled by outside sources, , but the resulting low rating might not be entirely fair. Our product description clearly mentions the 5 generations issue. Plus, we offer access to all of our image resources, which are typically reserved for subscribers, for free.
As for the image quality, personal preferences vary. We've provided some of the best AI-generated skybox visuals on the market, and many users are happy with the results. With AI-generated content, the more users engage, the more we can improve.

As for the other features, we strive to provide as much value as possible for a fair price. Many users enjoy the variety of fun tools we offer, and we aim for high cost-effectiveness. However, being a small team, balancing numerous features means not every aspect will be perfect right away. But if you're willing to grow with us, we’ll continue to improve over time.

That said, if our product isn’t quite what you’re looking for, we respect your decision and are happy to process a refund.

Thank you for giving us a try!

reviews.review_description: Awesome app. Desert island app. If you like meta quest environments like Cyber City, Blue Hills Gold Mine, etc and don't have a Steam and Sidequest capable $1,000 gaming computer, this is the app. Tons of free virtual environments. Additional AI generates are available for money but you only get 5 free ones and they go fast. Really fast like I think I inadvertently generated one or else they just added one more to the count without me generating anything. Anyways, the free ones more than make up for that. This app is a must have.

Hi nautilus, thank you so much for your kind words and support! We’re really happy you’re loving the environments and think our App is a must-have. I hear you on the AI generations and will definitely share that with the team to see how we can improve it.

We are working hard to add new portals, worlds, and more exciting features in future updates. Stay tuned!

reviews.review_description: I wasted my money. I followed the instructions carefully. When they didn’t work, I had to search for a YouTube video to explain how to even get the app to work, Which was extremely difficult. It took me two days to get it working. When I was finally done, I downloaded a custom home, and all I got was a white screen. I want a refund!

developer_response.body:
Please check out the latest Overhaul version of our App and feel free to share your thoughts!

----------
Hi Dylan, just wanted to let you know that the white screen issue with custom homes has been fixed over the past few weeks. Feel free to check it out!
---------
Hi insanekaboom, thank you for your feedback, and I’m really sorry for the frustration. If you're referring to the custom homes installation, please note that due to recent frequent system updates, this feature is temporarily incompatible with version 68 and above, as stated in the app. We are actively working on updates, and we kindly ask for your patience; we’ll let you know once this issue is resolved.

As for the complexity of the process, we all know that just getting through the process puts you ahead of many people, which is much admirable. The complexity is unfortunately due to system limitations, but we’ve tried to make it as user-friendly as possible with in-VR preview and download options—at least it’s more convenient than having to use a computer and then find out that the experience wasn’t what you expected  after installation. Believe me, once you get the hang of it, the process becomes much easier. 

If you need any help, feel free to reach out here and I will walk you through the journey of custom homes: https://discord.gg/HwZr7kgRyF

Of course, if you’re still not satisfied, we completely respect your decision to request a refund. Thank you again for giving us a try!

reviews.review_description: 99% of the 3D homes are available free on the sidequest store. Most of the custom homes offered are just gross AI generated skyboxes. You can place some basic assets to customize about a dozen homes that support it but it has 0 Quality of life enhancements. The asset menu is a single basic list, and placing them has no collision detection so they easily clip through the floor. I'd skip it. The only thing it does better then sidequest is give the ability to preview a custom app quickly before installing it, but I'm not sure it's worth 10$ and the fact they're free apps makes the whole experience feel shady. Did the creators authorize their custom apps to be used for this one?

developer_response.body:
Please check out the latest Overhaul version of our App and feel free to share your thoughts!

----------
We're sorry to hear about your disappointment. Developing 3D features and AI generation comes with its costs, and we understand that it may not meet everyone's expectations. Besides 3D homes and AI-generated content, we also offer Portal experiences and many other features. We appreciate your feedback and will continue working to enhance our app. Thank you for sharing your thoughts with us.

reviews.review_description:
I'm very disappointed. With the skyboxes I see a lot of AI-made environments as far as I can tell, with many strange errors and also many scantily clad ladies and gentlemen. Would be nice if you could search or that there are filters or categories, like with the home environments. The home environments have some good 360 photos but also some very grainy ones. A lot custom made ones are available on SideQuest.  

I expected much more from this. The mixed reality portal is cool, but the quality of the 3D backgrounds is disappointing. The AI created environements have stitching errors, unlogically placed items, roads leading to nowhere etc. I had really hoped for better quality environments that work as home environments, so are created with that in mind and not a lot of 360 images and photos that are sometimes of too low quality to use for this or have errors, deformed objects etc.

developer_response.body:
Please check out the latest Overhaul version of our App and feel free to share your thoughts!

----------
Hi there, thank you for sharing your thoughts. We're so sorry to hear that your experience didn't meet expectations. We're a small team but strive to deliver a better experience. We appreciate your feedback, and we're actively working on improving the quality of AI-generated environments, addressing stitching errors, and enhancing the overall content curation.  We've taken note of your suggestions regarding search, filters, and categories. Thank you so much!

 If you have more insights or specific preferences, feel free to share with us, and stay tuned for the future updates.
Join us on discord anytime you need: https://discord.gg/HwZr7kgRyF

I'll love to see more AI and MR portal content for moon vr home soon.

reviews.review_description: The app claims to have 10,000 high quality homes.   However when you click the homes button you are offered a total 189 homes of which only 93 are 3D, very few would meet anyone’s definition of high quality and all are available on side quest for free.     The rest are just AI generated 2d pics or blurring 2d home snaps that I guarantee you don’t want as your home environment.  I would happily pay £5 for a single stand alone home environment of the quality of the default quest home environments such as the desert terrace. Thus £7.99 for hundreds should be an absolute steal yet I am struggling to recommend this app.    I’m not applying for a refund because I’m hoping it will show it’s worth in time but right now it’s a one star app that needs to stay in the App Lab.

developer_response.body:
Please check out the latest Overhaul version of our App and feel free to share your thoughts!

----------
Hi CPaulStewart, we appreciate your feedback and apologize for any confusion.
We appreciate your detailed feedback. It seems there might be a disconnect in the interpretation of the term "homes." Our aim is to offer a diverse range of virtual environments, including 3D homes and panoramas(skyboxes, which could also be customized in Quest Home). 

Regarding 'high quality', you're absolutely right. While not every piece meets that standard, we acknowledge the need for improvement and are committed to enhancing our content. We'll work on refining our content creation and recommendations to showcase more exceptional environments.

Our intention is to cater to various preferences, and we value your input. And we're striving to offer a more refined experience. Stay tuned for updates, and feel free to share any specific preferences you have. We're here to make it right!

Join us on discord anytime you need: https://discord.gg/HwZr7kgRyF

We provide 5 free ai generation trials as we said in our store product page. But you can access the member-only gallery which has tens of thousands of skyboxes.

AI generation indeed comes with costs, and we've incorporated various features beyond AI. We encourage you to explore these aspects. 

If you still find the app doesn't align with your expectations, you're eligible for a refund. As a small team, we kindly request reconsideration before leaving a negative review.

Thank you for your understanding.

reviews.review_description: Boasts having AI generated capabilities, but fails to mention you get only FIVE lifetime attempts, unless you want to pay for more. You’re better off creating the images yourself

developer_response.body:
Hi, sorry about the misinformation. We've updated our product page.

The cost for AI-generated-content(image and text) is indeed quite high. And unfortunately, subscription is unavailable for apps on Applab. Not being accepted into the Oculus store means a lack of income.That's why, at the moment, we provide users with 5 free generations only and offer in-app purchases (IAP) for those who need more.
· Typically, access to community AI content is a feature reserved for subscribed members. However, at this early stage, we want to inspire users to create and share interesting content. So, we've opened up access to community AI-generated content for all users. We hope you all enjoy exploring and creating in our community!

reviews.review_title: Just what I need it for my skybox
reviews.review_description: The skybox is a complicated place and I have been wanting to personalize it. This app lets you do that although there are many steps, you have to go through to get to where you can finally install your personalized skybox, it is very much worth it. If you’re having problems, just reread the directions. Thank you for this app. And thank you for all the updates you have been making!

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for taking the time to leave us a 5-star rating and sharing your feedback! Enjoy your magic journey with Moon! Again, we will keep you updated in the discord server. ❤

reviews.review_description:
First, the bad. When using the AI and designing people the faces are jacked up. It wasn't as bad before but recently the faces are sometimes all nose or three eyes or basically a mis-mash of skin. It happened in all of the categories I chose. So it's not limited to one category. 
Two, a lot of times when you save an AI generated image, it doesn't always save. I basically pop into my files to see if it saves now. It's usually 1 out of the 10 we can do daily. 
Three- The keyboard. Oh man. It's buggy. I have to pretty much check every letter because it messes up a lot. ALOT. And it sucks to not be able to just move the cursor. If you have a large description and want to change just say the third sentence, you're screwed. You have to either type it all over again or delete from the end all the way back to where you need to edit. That's a HUGE pain. If you could copy the keyboard in Horizon Worlds, that would be a great upgrade. 
That's all the criticism I have. The 10 images daily isn't my cup of tea, but if you didn't limit it I would probably die from thirst because I'd never stop creating new environments! 

Now the good: Everything. I know what I said before but I also realize that it's AI. It's basically sorcery. A program makes my words into a huge image. How the hell can I complain about that! My feedback is because I'm asking for perfection. Lol. This app is really amazing. I use the Hogwarts environment and I just stare at it. It's amazing. Then being able to take a pic and use it as a skybox is unreal. I broke my girlfriend's brain when I used a pic of her and made it my background! This app is incredible and I would pay for it if you made a premium version without hesitation. Keep up the outstanding work.

developer_response.body:
Thank you Triggatron, for your feedback and support. That means a lot to us! 
As a small team, we are committed to continuously improving and addressing your mentioned issues. We are actively working on optimizing the AI generation and will check the saving functionality and the keyboard issues. 
Your feedback regarding the keyboard in Horizon Worlds and a premium version is noted, and we will consider it for future upgrades to provide a smoother user experience.

Again, thank you for your feedback and for being a part of our incredible community. Keep creating and enjoy the outstanding work you're doing with our app! 
Feel free to join our discord server and stay tuned for the latest update! 
https://discord.gg/HwZr7kgRyF

We're so sorry to hear about the issue you're facing. Our team couldn't reproduce this problem. To better assist you, could you please check a few things for us?

1. Network Connection: Ensure you have a stable internet connection.
2. App Version: Make sure you are using the latest version of our app. Outdated versions may have compatibility issues.
3. System Version: Confirm that your Quest's system is up to date.

If the issue persists after checking these factors, we recommend joining our Discord community, for more real-time assistance and troubleshooting. 
https://discord.gg/HwZr7kgRyF

Please feel free to reach out, and we'll do our best to resolve this for you. Thank you for your understanding!

reviews.review_description:
This is a silly little app that adds to the fun of Quest 2 experience. What is it? Basically it is a database and installer of custom home environments. Many of the environments are themed from movie/TV, games, anime and the like. Most of the themes are available in versions from app lab but Moon VR Home allows you to load them directly to your headset without having to sideload them. True you could sideload SideQuest to your headset and install them directly that way but Moon VR Home has a twist. You can customize a few of the environments. Customization includes adding images (stock and your own uploaded/screenshots), skyboxes (background scenes in windows), background music/sounds, and 3D models.
The developers continue to add features and port/add environments so the boredom factor is low to nil.
Lots of fun to be had. Check it out.

developer_response.body: Thanks a lot for your support! We will continue to improve the app and bring you more fun!

Spectacular application.
For the first time I had the opportunity to feel like I was in MY home.
I managed to thrill my son who literally went crazy when he found himself in Peach's castle!
And I too went crazy with joy when I had the opportunity to FINALLY recreate an environment that was at least plausible to the real one of my real spaces.

 If I now appreciate the Quest 2 more, it is thanks to the work of this team.
Thanks guys!

reviews.review_title: Has Potential, But Needs Work to Shine
reviews.review_description:
This app is a promising showcase that needs some polish. I can see why it’s on App Lab and not the main store just yet. I really love the mixed reality on Q3 and the ability to create a portal in your room and describe a location to travel to…very cool stuff. But this would be so much better if the Devs would incorporate a keyboard with voice functions like the existing Quest keyboard. I don’t want to type in long descriptions when I could just speak them. 

Some other portal door options would also be amazing. Obviously, I would love to be able to actually enter the portal completely if I choose and become immersed in my creation. Currently, it’s a little tricky to be able to fully immerse yourself but I love seeing the portal door back to my room off in the distance. So much potential! Imagine if you could enter a portal and have the world come alive around you…cars zooming down the street, the noise of a rainy city…like you landed in the middle of a scene in action. One day! 

In the meantime, I hope the Devs keep working on this app and polishing the experience so it eventually finds its way onto the main store. I think some users are longing for experiences where they can just immerse themselves in cool environments. There are so many games on the store, but not as many experiences that just allow you to bask and immerse yourself in the magic of VR. Moon could be one of those apps.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your thoughtful and detailed feedback! We're thrilled that you see the potential in our app and glad you find it cool! 

Voice functions are definitely something we're considering, and more portal door options are on our radar. We love your vision of fully immersing yourself. It's something we're exploring for future updates. Stay tuned for updates as we work towards offering even more magical experiences. Thank you for being part of our journey! So honored to have users like you!
Join us on discord anytime you need: https://discord.gg/HwZr7kgRyF
